case_title: CARMEN VIERA VS. PROFESSIONAL TAX CARE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JULY 29, 2011 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, MATTER WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.
